intro: An elderly researcher in a lab coat waves you over, a stack of jumbled notes in hand.
speaker: Professor Oak
introDialogue: Ah, perfect timing! My Pokédex entries got all jumbled up and I can't tell which is which.$Help me match these descriptions to the right Pokémon and I'll see you well rewarded - the more you get right, the better. Will you help an old professor out?
title: The Scrambled Pokédex
description: Professor Oak shows you four Pokédex entries and asks you to name each one from four choices. The more you name correctly, the better your reward.

1.label: Help the Professor
1.tooltip:
(+) Name 4 jumbled dex entries
(+) The more you get right, the better the reward
1.selected: The Professor beams and lays out the first entry.

2.label: Not now
2.selected: You wish the Professor luck and move on.
